description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced train service on National Day and the days before and after
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 國慶日及前後加強列車服務

2024-10-08T06:15:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate passenger travels, MTRCL will enhance the train service during the Chung Yeung Festival long weekend (11 to 13 October) · A more frequent train service will be provided on Island Line and East Rail Line on different dates and times For more information, please browse MTRCL website.
2024-10-08T06:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 港鐵會於重陽節長周末期間（10月11日至13日）加強列車服務，方便大家乘車外出 ·港島綫及東鐵綫於不同日子及時段加密班次 詳情請瀏覽港鐵網⾴。

2024-10-08T07:00:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Tseung Kwan O Tunnel Road (Kwun Tong bound) near Tseung Kwan O Telephone Exchange which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-08T07:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的將軍澳隧道公路(往觀塘方向)近將軍澳電話機房的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-10-08T07:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Fanling Highway (Sheung Shui bound) near Wo Hop Shek is still being closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic queue on Fanling Highway (Sheung Shui bound) ends at Fanling Highway near Tai Hang. Traffic is congested now.
2024-10-08T07:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，粉嶺公路(往上水方向)近和合石的部份行車線仍然封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時在粉嶺公路(往上水方向)的車龍龍尾已到粉嶺公路近泰亨。 現時上址交通擠塞。
